title: Child/Adolescent Residential Treatment Facilities - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Child/Adolescent Residential Treatment Facilities 11 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF JASPER MOUNTAIN JASPER MOUNTAIN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an intensive treatment home with a highly structured environment in a favorable treatment family setting for severely abused and disturbed children. All types of severe emotional and serious behaviors are addressed. However, the program is not designed for children with chronic psychosis or significant developmental disabilities. Proven interventions used are effective with problems such as violent behaviors, sexual acting-out, emotional issues stemming from the effects of childhood trauma, fire-setting, serious difficulties attaching and bonding to others, and delayed social development. 37875 Jasper-Lowell Road Jasper, OR 97438 Eligibility: Ages 3-13 Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Facility: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 747-1235 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JASPER MOUNTAIN SAFE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides stabilization, assessment, and family evaluation services to children and their families. The program provides short-term residential treatment for children. Short-term crisis stays are also available for children in need of immediate stabilization (72 hours). 89124 Marcola Road Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: -Ages 3-13 -Signs of serious emotional disturbance -Signs of destructive behavior patterns -In need of immediate stabilization Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Crisis Response Program: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 741-7402 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KAIROS KAIROS CADENZA RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOME RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOMES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a residential treatment home that houses five young adults with serious mental and behavioral disorders. The facility is non-secure. Residents receive intensive mental health services geared toward helping them develop the thinking and coping skills that will assist them in making the transition to adulthood. Staff help them learn to navigate the work and/or education worlds and to develop skills that enable them to attend school, work, and live independently in the community. 4385 Sunnyside Road NE Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Ages 17-24 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 520-1332 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KAIROS KAIROS MOMENTUM RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOME RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOMES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a residential treatment home that houses five young adults with serious mental and behavioral disorders. The facility is non-secure. Residents receive intensive mental health services geared toward helping them develop the thinking and coping skills that will assist them in making the transition to adulthood. Staff help them learn to navigate the work and/or education worlds and to develop skills that enable them to attend school, work, and live independently in the community. 1920 Kurtz Lane Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Ages 17-24 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 520-1332 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KAIROS KAIROS TEMPO RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOME RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOMES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a residential treatment home that houses five young adults with serious mental and behavioral disorders. The facility is non-secure. Residents receive intensive mental health services geared toward helping them develop the thinking and coping skills that will assist them in making the transition to adulthood. Staff help them learn to navigate the work and/or education worlds and to develop skills that enable them to attend school, work, and live independently in the community. 348 Ruby Avenue Eugene, OR 97404 Eligibility: Ages 17-24 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 520-1332 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MADRONA RECOVERY RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a residential program offering co-occurring mental health, trauma, and substance use recovery services. Programming is centered around building skills in emotional regulation, resiliency, conflict resolution, and communication. 7000 SW Varns Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Ages 13-17 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 749-0200 528 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEXT DOOR TREATMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides therapeutic support to children, teens, and their families. Services include counseling, therapeutic day treatment schooling programs, and in-home supportive services. Offers therapeutic Foster Care for forster children and teens who have emotional, behavioral, and/or medical needs. 965 Tucker Road Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Youth involved in the child welfare or juvenile justice systems Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 436-0333 345 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a call-in center for family members of children and youth with special needs and chronic health conditions (developmental and emotional disabilities, behavioral problems, and chronic physical illnesses) and professionals who serve them. The center specializes in providing information and resources related to health information, health care access, and special needs systems and supports. All calls are confidential. Families may also request to be placed on an email list to receive monthly correspondence about issues of importance to children and youth with special needs in Oregon. 707 SW Gaines Street Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Family members of individuals age 26 and younger with special physical, emotional, behavioral, or mental health needs, including those who are at risk or suspected of having a special need. The child/youth does not have to have a diagnosed condition. Does not require documentation to prove citizenship to receive services. Hours: Message line available 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (833) 990-9930 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RIMROCK TRAILS TREATMENT SERVICES PRINEVILLE YOUTH RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM ADOLESCENT RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides residential treatment for youth with substance use and mental health needs. Youth live in a coeducational setting for 50 days or longer. Focuses on building coping and life skills, preventing relapse, improving relationships, and managing emotions and stress. Youth receive individual counseling, attend daily group therapy, continue their education on site, and take part in daily chores, sports, and activities. Additional supports include access to a gym, weight room, rock climbing wall, equine therapy, and art therapy. 1333 NW 9th Street Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Ages 12-17 Hours: Main Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Program: Staffed 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 447-2631 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES CORVALLIS DAY TREATMENT PSYCHIATRIC RESIDENTIAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers short-term, on-site psychiatric services requiring 24-hour support for emotional and behavioral challenges. 4455 NE Highway 20 Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Ages 5-17 who meet the requirements for an eligible mental health diagnosis Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES CORVALLIS DAY TREATMENT SUBACUTE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers brief and intensive on-site psychiatric services that stabilize youth after a significant emotional or behavioral incident. Services include psychiatric evaluation, medication management, individual and family therapies, nursing care, school instruction during the school year, and 24-hour care in a secure facility. 4455 NE Highway 20 Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Ages 5-17 who are in need of 24-hour inpatient treatment and stabilization for significant behavioral and mental health challenges Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 758-7724 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES PSYCHIATRIC RESIDENTIAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers short-term, on-site psychiatric services requiring 24-hour support for emotional and behavioral challenges. 3415 SE Powell Boulevard Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Ages 5-17 who meet the requirements for an eligible mental health diagnosis Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES SUBACUTE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers brief and intensive on-site psychiatric services that stabilize youth after a significant emotional or behavioral incident. Services include psychiatric evaluation, medication management, individual and family therapies, nursing care, school instruction during the school year, and 24-hour care in a secure facility. 3415 SE Powell Boulevard Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Ages 5-17 who are in need of 24-hour inpatient treatment and stabilization for significant behavioral and mental health challenges Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details JASPER MOUNTAIN JASPER MOUNTAIN CENTER JASPER MOUNTAIN SAFE CENTER KAIROS RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOMES KAIROS RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOMES KAIROS RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOMES MADRONA RECOVERY RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT NEXT DOOR TREATMENT SERVICES OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER RIMROCK TRAILS TREATMENT SERVICES ADOLESCENT RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES PSYCHIATRIC RESIDENTIAL TRILLIUM FAMILY SERVICES PSYCHIATRIC RESIDENTIAL
